name: Stir-Fried Pineapple Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the boned chicken into thin slices.
2. Heat several tablespoons of oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
3. Add the pineapple tidbits to the hot oil and sprinkle with salt, then add enough chicken broth or stock to cover the pieces. Cook for 1 minute, stirring occasionally.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together cornstarch diluted in water with sesame oil, brandy, soy sauce, and sugar until it forms a thick paste.
5. Add the chicken mixture to the wok with the pineapple tidbits and stir-fry for 2 to 3 minutes, continuously stirring to ensure even cooking.
6. Serve hot.
FROM: Chinese Wok
